posts.author: MandyJ_24
posts.text: Just trying to sort out this weird thing with @QuickSupportHelp. They keep asking for my full home address and postcode so they can 'verify' me, but it feels a bit invasive since I've never met them. Also noticed someone tagging me about my daily routine at the park which is getting annoying. #Privacy
posts.explanation: This post involves a request for sensitive personal information and exposure of private details, requiring specialist review.
